```json
{
  "skill_id": "arabic-typography",
  "name": "Arabic Typography & RTL Design",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "description": "Hardened rules for Arabic font selection, RTL layout mirroring, numeral systems, and line-height optimization to prevent CLS and ensure readability.",
  "locales": ["ar"],
  "commands": ["/CHECK typography arabic", "/FIX rtl"],
  "agents": ["rtl-specialist", "visual-design-manager"],
  "protocols": [
    "Mirroring: All directional CSS (left/right, padding/margin) must use logical properties (start/end) or RTL-specific overrides.",
    "Font Loading: Prioritize variable fonts with specific Arabic support (e.g., IBM Plex Sans Arabic, Readex Pro, Noto Sans Arabic).",
    "Line Height: Arabic script requires 1.4-1.6x line-height compared to Latin scripts (default 1.2 is too tight).",
    "Numerals: Default to Western Arabic numerals (1, 2, 3) unless 'Eastern Arabic' (١، ٢، ٣) is explicitly requested for traditional/religious context.",
    "Kashida: Never use automated Kashida justification in web views; use letter-spacing: 0 and specific word-spacing instead.",
    "Punctuation Mirroring: Ensure parentheses, question marks (؟), and commas (،) are correctly mirrored for RTL."
  ],
  "pack_path": ".cursor/skills/content/arabic-typography/"
}
```
